case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. ANGELO G ESPINOZA

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, ANGELO G SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-12-2018
DECLARATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL RE: ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210001283) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, ANGELO G $6,607.12 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,757.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 210001283) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, ANGELO G
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100039944), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SERVED NOV-06-2018, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE NOV-24-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, ANGELO G
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100042780) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, ANGELO G
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100042780) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
